hero.subtitle: Azka for Information Technology — Delivering cutting-edge IT solutions since 1989

about.title: We are Azka
about.body1: Azka for Systems and Computers was established in 1989. It initially focused on software development, then expanded to include computer hardware and accessories.
about.body2: Since its founding, Azka has continuously provided clients with the latest technologies to keep pace with the rapid evolution in information technology.
about.body3: Azka is an authorized partner of both Microsoft and IBM, and received the IBM Best Business Partner Award in 2006. The company was transformed into Azka for Information Technology in 2002.

vmv.title: Vision, Mission & Values
vmv.vision_body: To provide the Saudi market with the IT solutions it needs to achieve comprehensive digital transformation.
vmv.mission_body: To plan, design, build, and manage automated systems while providing supporting services through the optimal investment of available resources.

values.title: Quality & Excellence
values.desc: We commit to the highest quality standards in everything we deliver

values.title: Innovation & Development
values.desc: We embrace the latest technologies and innovate advanced solutions

values.title: Teamwork Spirit
values.desc: We believe in the power of collaboration to achieve the best results

values.title: Customer First
values.desc: We place our clients' needs at the forefront of our priorities

values.title: Accountability
values.desc: We honor our commitments and take full responsibility

chatbot.title: Azka Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: We typically reply within minutes
chatbot.greeting: Hello! I'm Azka's smart assistant. How can I help you today?

answers.What are Azka's services?:
Azka provides comprehensive IT services including:
• Planning, design, and building of automated systems
• HR and attendance management systems
• Financial solutions and electronic archiving
• Procurement and administrative communications
• Mobile apps and systems integration
answers.How to contact you?:
You can reach us via:
📞 Phone: +966 (12) 6500223
📠 Fax: +966 (12) 6500171
📧 Email: connect@azka.com

Or fill out the contact form at the bottom of the page.
answers.What are your working hours?:
Our working hours:
🟢 Sunday — Thursday: 8:00 AM — 5:00 PM
🟡 Saturday: 12:00 PM — 4:00 PM
🔴 Friday: Closed
answers.What systems do you offer?:
We offer 12 integrated systems:
1. Human Resources
2. Attendance & Departure
3. Financial System
4. Electronic Archiving
5. Procurement & Contracts
6. Administrative Communications
7. Warehouse Management
8. Self Services
9. Biometric Recognition
10. Access Permits
11. Mobile App Development
12. Systems Integration
answers.Where are your offices?:
Our headquarters is in:
📍 Jeddah, Saudi Arabia
P.O.Box: 1485, Jeddah 21431

We have 4 offices across the Kingdom.
answers.Do you serve government entities?: Absolutely! We have the honor of serving numerous government entities across Saudi Arabia, in addition to national and private companies, with outstanding success in all our projects.
answers.How to request a quote?:
To request a quote:
1. Fill out the contact form on the main page
2. Email us: connect@azka.com
3. Call us directly: +966 (12) 6500223

Our team will get back to you within one business day.
answers.Who are your clients?:
We serve a wide range of clients across Saudi Arabia:
🏛️ Multiple government entities
🏢 Major national companies
🏭 Private sector organizations

We have successfully completed over 77 projects.

systems.cta_body: Contact our team for a free demo

hr.name: Human Resources System
hr.description: An integrated system for managing all aspects of human resources, from talent acquisition and employee lifecycle management to end of service, with full support for Saudi labor law requirements.

attendance.name: Attendance & Departure System
attendance.tagline: Accurate and Automated Work Time Tracking
attendance.description: A smart system for monitoring and recording employee attendance and departure with high precision, with automatic payroll integration and detailed reporting.

financial.name: Financial System
financial.description: A complete accounting system covering all financial needs of the organization, from general accounting and receivables management to financial statement preparation.

archiving.name: Electronic Archiving System
archiving.tagline: Smart Digitization for All Your Documents
archiving.description: An advanced electronic archiving system for digitizing, storing, and managing all organizational documents with instant search and retrieval of any document in seconds.

procurement.name: Procurement, Contracts & Tenders
procurement.description: A comprehensive system for managing the entire procurement cycle from purchase requests through tenders and negotiations to contracts, delivery, and payment.

communications.name: Administrative Communications System
communications.description: An integrated electronic system for managing all internal and external administrative correspondence and transactions with complete tracking of each transaction's path.

warehouse.name: Warehouse & Inventory Management
warehouse.description: An integrated system for warehouse management and tracking the movement of materials and goods with precise inventory control and reorder alerts.

self-service.name: Self-Service System
self-service.tagline: Empowering Employees to Handle Their Own Transactions
self-service.description: An electronic portal that enables employees to request services and complete their transactions independently without the need for personal visits.

biometric.name: Biometric Recognition System
biometric.description: Advanced biometric recognition systems for login and identity verification using fingerprint, facial recognition, and iris scanning.

access.name: Access Permits System
access.tagline: Smart Control Over Access and Security
access.description: An integrated system for managing access permissions to buildings and restricted areas with complete logging of all entry and exit movements.

mobile.name: Mobile App Development
mobile.tagline: Professional Mobile Apps for Your Systems
mobile.description: Custom mobile application development for Azka systems and your existing systems on iOS and Android with modern design and high performance.

integration.name: Systems Integration
integration.tagline: Connect All Your Systems Into One Ecosystem
integration.description: Advanced integration solutions for connecting Azka systems with each other and with external systems to ensure smooth and secure data flow.
